title: LostDepths
description: Add ancient mystery of the lost solar system and it's forgotten tech.
body:
![LostDepths Banner](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/48gqzncM/images/20317d4ad08c1519c466eefbcf4124e8df895cf7.png)

Advanture mod focusing on events before "Player" joined world.

## Features:

- Advancements
- New dimensions
- Machines
- Weapons are OP, but expensive to craft
- Armor
- Few decorative blocks
- Dungeons
- Patchouli Guide
- Mobs
- Wither/Dragon Proof Glass
- Power generation
- Cables
- Signs

## Story/Lore

- WIP, will be added in future updates [On Hold]

## Language:
- EN

### TODO list and full changelog:
